<!-- ghmig:moved -->
> **This repository has moved to [https://git.navicore.tech/navicore/sequence-rmd](https://git.navicore.tech/navicore/sequence-rmd).**
>
> The GitHub copy is archived and no longer maintained.

---
title: "Navicore POC Workbook"
author: ejs
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    number_sections: true
    highlight: haddock
fontsize: 12pt
geometry: margin=.5in
---

Sequence Diagrams for Creating DTs
========

This is a starter kit for creating an `rmakrdown` report with embedded
plantuml diagrams.  Run the `build.sh` cmd.  Depends on plantuml.

\newpage

Define Actor / DT
---------

![localImage](diagrams/define_dt.png)


\newpage

Update Actor / DT
---------

![localImage](diagrams/define_dt.png)

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=7, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
```
